name: よあそびぐらしっ！
title: よあそびぐらしっ
overview_en: Meet Kazuto whose hopes of becoming a photographer didn t pan out and Yayoi who successfully achieved her dream of becoming a model Two childhood friends who have grown apart Suddenly find themselves living together In the beginning there s an awkward tension between them and Yayoi has a secret she can t tell Kazuto Then one night things start to change Could they be more than just childhood friends
